title: cymbopogon commutatus
intro: Cymbopogon commutatus, also known as East Indian lemon grass, is a tropical grass native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and strong citrus scent. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cymbopogon commutatus include its ability to relieve stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cymbopogon commutatus can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and topical creams, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce pain and inflammation, and improve overall well-being.
